title: Samsung Launches Its First Credit Card: Here Are All the Perks
summary: It also offers 3% cash rewards on purchases made via Samsung Wallet and 2% cash rewards on Netflix, Disney+, and Spotify. The physical card is a black metal card with a Samsung logo.
